title: Mylett Road Section
summary: Mylett Road Section is a road cut that shows the geology of the Mydrim Shales. It is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
text: Mylett Road Section is a road cut that shows the geology of the Mydrim Shales. It is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
